details: All schedule IDs (S-2024-Q1, S-2024-Q2), sub-audit names (Financial Controls, IT Security), and risk levels (Zero Tolerance, High, Medium) are correctly identified and used in context.
S-2024-Q2 is correctly identified as having the lowest closure health score (73.4) among the two schedules.
Financial Controls is correctly identified as the sub-audit with the highest non-accepted volume (25 issues).
Zero Tolerance is correctly identified as having the highest nonAcceptedPctOfRisk (100.0%).
All numerical values are directly extracted from the provided JSON payload, adhering to the 'NO CALCULATION' rule. No inconsistencies were found.
